title: ligustrum sinense var. coryanum
intro: Ligustrum sinense var. coryanum, also known as the Chinese Privet or Narrow-leaf Privet, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Ligustrum sinense var. coryanum include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Ligustrum sinense var. coryanum can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
